login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your a4u workspace

invitation.title: Accept invitation
invitation.subtitle: You have been invited to {{org}} as {{role}}
invitation.passwordHint: Min 10 characters, one uppercase, one digit
invitation.alreadyRegistered: You are already registered. Click "Accept" to be added.
invitation.invalidOrExpired: The invitation is not valid, has expired or has already been used.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: Create and manage your organization's courses.
courses.createSubtitle: Fill in the basic parameters. You can always come back later to edit them and trigger AI content generation.
courses.editSubtitle: Edit course parameters. Changes are saved automatically.

setup.lockedBanner: Didactic setup confirmed. Parameters are not editable. Unlock to reopen edits.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm didactic setup?
confirmDialog.message: After confirmation, the basic information and didactic framing will become read-only. Only a creator or org admin can unlock the setup to edit them again.

toast.unlocked: Setup unlocked. You can edit parameters again.

fields.title: Title
fields.objectivesPlaceholder: What will the student learn at the end of the course?
fields.cfuHint: Number of academic credits. Determines the number of modules and lessons.
fields.argomentiChiavePlaceholder: Add a topic and press Enter…
fields.argomentiChiaveHint: Press Enter or comma to add. Maximum {{max}} topics.

summary.title: Sizing summary
summary.createHint: Full sizing (lessons, duration, assessment) will be available after the first save.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete the course?
deleteConfirm.message: You are about to delete "{{title}}". This is irreversible and will remove all uploaded documents.

docs.types: PDF, DOC/DOCX, TXT, MD, RTF — max {{max}} MB each

reprocessConfirm.title: Regenerate the summary?
reprocessConfirm.message: You are about to regenerate the summary for "{{name}}". New OpenAI tokens will be consumed.

architecture.empty: No architecture generated yet. Click "Generate architecture" to start.
architecture.noDocsTooltip: At least one document with a `Ready` summary is required to generate the architecture.
architecture.pendingMessage: Generating the course architecture. The system is calling the AI with the course parameters and the summaries of the uploaded documents.

module.dialogDescription: Set the module title and description. The code (M1, M2…) is assigned automatically.

fields.title: Module title
fields.titleHint: A concise title identifying the main topic of the module.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. In this module we will introduce the basic concepts of supervised machine learning, with practical examples of classification and regression.
fields.descriptionHint: A short description (1-3 sentences) used by the AI to generate the lesson content for this module.

module.deleteConfirmMessage: You are about to delete "{{label}}" and all its lessons. This is irreversible.

lesson.dialogDescription: Set the lesson title, summary and — for the introductory lesson — recommended textbooks. The code (M1.L1…) is assigned automatically.

fields.title: Lesson title
fields.titleHint: A concise title identifying the topic of the lesson.
fields.summaryPlaceholder: E.g. Overview of the main classification algorithms (k-NN, decision trees, SVM) with practical examples and a comparison of their performance.
fields.summaryHint: A short summary (1-3 sentences) used by the AI to generate the lesson content.
fields.isIntroductoryHint: The introductory lesson opens the course and includes recommended textbooks. Usually the first lesson of the first module (M1.L1).

bibliography.title: Recommended bibliography
bibliography.hint: Books and sources the student can consult for further study. Up to 20 entries.
bibliography.empty: No books added yet. Click "Add book" to start.

fields.title: Title
fields.notePlaceholder: E.g. Classic reference text for the course.

lesson.deleteConfirmMessage: You are about to delete "{{label}}". This is irreversible.

architecture.approvedBanner: Architecture approved. You can now move on to the next phases (lesson structure, content, slides, speech).
architecture.readyBanner: The architecture is ready for review. Approve it if it looks good, or regenerate with specific guidance.

generateDialog.title: Generate course architecture
generateDialog.description: The AI will propose the course structure (modules and lessons) based on the configured parameters and the uploaded documents. Generation takes a few seconds.

regenerateDialog.title: Regenerate architecture
regenerateDialog.description: The current architecture will be replaced. You can provide specific guidance to drive the regeneration (optional).
regenerateDialog.hintPlaceholder: E.g. "Add a healthcare case study" or "Lower the technical level, it's too advanced for the audience".
regenerateDialog.hintHelper: Leave empty for a standard regeneration. Up to 2000 characters.

lessonsStructure.title: Lesson structure
lessonsStructure.description: For each module, the AI generates learning objectives, mandatory topics, prerequisites, and a section outline for every lesson. You can generate all modules in batch or one at a time.
lessonsStructure.architectureNotApproved: Approve the course architecture first to access lesson structure generation.

lesson.editDescription: Edit objectives, mandatory topics, prerequisites and section outline of the lesson. Changes may invalidate downstream generation of content, slides and speech.

objective.placeholder: E.g. The student will be able to apply the k-NN algorithm to a labeled dataset.
objective.prefixHintIt: Start with "Lo studente sarà in grado di…".
objective.prefixHintEn: Start with "The student will be able to…".

topic.rationalePlaceholder: E.g. It is fundamental to understand the idea of instance-based learning.

prerequisite.placeholder: E.g. Basic knowledge of Euclidean distance.

section.purposePlaceholder: E.g. Introduce the mathematical formulation of the k-NN algorithm.
section.coverageHint: Select one or more mandatory topics covered by this section.
section.uncoveredWarning: Warning: some mandatory topics are not covered by any section: {{ids}}
section.noTopicsHint: No topics available. Add a mandatory topic first.

generateModule.title: Generate structure for {{module}}
generateModule.description: The AI will generate objectives, topics, prerequisites and section outlines for the lessons of this module, based on the approved architecture and uploaded documents.

regenerateModule.title: Regenerate structure for {{module}}
regenerateModule.description: The current module structure will be replaced. You can provide specific guidance to drive the regeneration (optional).

generateAll.title: Generate structure for all modules
generateAll.description: The AI will process module structures in parallel. You will see an aggregate progress bar and one per module.

regenerateAll.title: Regenerate structure for all modules
regenerateAll.description: The current structure of all modules will be replaced. You can provide specific guidance to drive the regeneration (optional).

dialog.hintPlaceholder: E.g. "Add a healthcare case study" or "Lower the technical level, it's too advanced for the audience".
dialog.hintHelper: Leave empty for a standard regeneration. Up to 2000 characters.

validation.objectiveRequired: At least one objective is required.
validation.coverageIncomplete: All mandatory topics must be covered by at least one section.

toast.batchStarted: Structure generation started for all modules.

lessonsContent.title: Lesson content
lessonsContent.description: For each lesson the AI writes the full markdown text with visual assets (Mermaid, LaTeX formulas, tables), examples, exercises and references.
lessonsContent.lessonsStructureNotApproved: Approve the lesson structure first to generate content.

generateLesson.title: Generate content for {{lesson}}
generateLesson.description: The AI will write the full lesson text with visual assets, examples, exercises and references.

regenerateLesson.title: Regenerate content of {{lesson}}
regenerateLesson.description: The current content will be replaced. You can provide specific instructions to guide the regeneration (optional).

generateAll.title: Generate content for all lessons
generateAll.description: The AI will process lessons in parallel (concurrency cap). The glossary will be auto-generated on the first task if missing.

regenerateAll.title: Regenerate all content
regenerateAll.description: All content will be replaced. You can provide specific instructions to guide the regeneration (optional).

dialog.hintPlaceholder: E.g. "Add a retail sector example and simplify section 3".
dialog.hintHelper: Leave empty for a standard regeneration. Max 2000 characters.

edit.title: Edit content of {{lesson}}
edit.description: Edit text, visual assets, tables, equations, examples and exercises of the lesson. Edits do not degrade the approval status.

toast.batchStarted: Content generation started for all lessons.

latex.previewEmpty: Start typing to see the preview

mermaid.previewEmpty: Type some code (or pick a template) to see the preview

lessonsSlides.title: Lesson slides
lessonsSlides.description: For each lesson, the AI produces a sequence of slides sized for the lesson duration. Slides reuse Phase 3 assets (diagrams, formulas, tables) and create new ones only when needed.
lessonsSlides.contentNotReady: Generate the lesson contents first to produce the slides.

editor.title: Title
editor.bodyPlaceholder: 1-3 short sentences. Leave empty for bullet-only slide.

generateLesson.title: Generate slides for {{lesson}}
generateLesson.description: The AI will produce the lesson slide sequence, reusing the visual assets from the content.

regenerateLesson.title: Regenerate slides for {{lesson}}
regenerateLesson.description: The current slides will be replaced. You can provide specific guidance to drive the regeneration (optional).

generateAll.title: Generate slides for all lessons
generateAll.description: The AI will process lessons with ready content in parallel. Other lessons are skipped.

regenerateAll.title: Regenerate all slides
regenerateAll.description: All existing slides will be replaced. You can provide specific guidance (optional).

dialog.hintPlaceholder: E.g. "Add a summary slide at the start and reduce total count".
dialog.hintHelper: Leave blank for a standard regeneration. Max 2000 characters.

edit.title: Edit slides for {{lesson}}
edit.description: Edit titles, bullets, referenced assets and new assets of the slides. Edits do not degrade approval status.

toast.batchStarted: Slides generation started on all lessons.

exportLesson.title: Export slides PDF — {{lesson}}
exportLesson.description: Choose the graphic template for the slides PDF.

exportAll.title: Export slides PDF for all lessons
exportAll.description: {{count}} lessons will be exported to PDF (one slide per page).

dialog.noTemplates: No template configured for the organization. The built-in default will be used.

toast.batchStarted: Slides PDF export started on all lessons.

lessonsSpeech.title: Lesson timed speech
lessonsSpeech.description: For each lesson, the AI produces the spoken script the instructor will read (and a future TTS will speak in the video), split into segments synchronized to the slides. The estimated total duration matches the lesson duration (±5%).
lessonsSpeech.slidesNotReady: Generate the lesson slides first to produce the speech.

editor.textPlaceholder: Natural prose, TTS-friendly. No abbreviations or special characters.
editor.deliveryNotesPlaceholder: E.g. "Warm tone, brief pause after the definition."
editor.ttsSafetyWarning: Warning: text contains characters or abbreviations that are not TTS-safe.
editor.uncoveredSlide: This slide has no associated segment.

generateLesson.title: Generate speech for {{lesson}}
generateLesson.description: The AI will produce the timed speech of the lesson, split into segments synchronized to the slides.

regenerateLesson.title: Regenerate speech for {{lesson}}
regenerateLesson.description: The current speech will be replaced. You can provide specific guidance to direct the regeneration (optional).

generateAll.title: Generate speech for all lessons
generateAll.description: The AI will process in parallel the lessons with ready slides. Other lessons will be skipped.

regenerateAll.title: Regenerate all speeches
regenerateAll.description: All existing speeches will be replaced. You can provide specific guidance to direct the regeneration (optional).

dialog.hintPlaceholder: E.g. "More casual tone", "Add a rhetorical question on concept slides".
dialog.hintHelper: Leave empty for a standard regeneration. Maximum 2000 characters.

edit.title: Edit speech of {{lesson}}
edit.description: Edit text, duration and notes of the speech segments. Edits do not degrade the approval status.

toast.batchStarted: Speech generation started on all lessons.

exportLesson.title: Export speech PDF — {{lesson}}
exportLesson.description: Choose the graphic template for the speech PDF.

exportAll.title: Export speech PDF for all lessons
exportAll.description: {{count}} lessons will be exported to PDF (speech text grouped by slide with cumulative timeline).

dialog.noTemplates: No template configured for the organization. The built-in default will be used.

toast.batchStarted: Speech PDF export started on all lessons.

glossary.title: Course glossary
glossary.autoGenerateHint: The glossary will be auto-created on the first content trigger, or you can generate it now.

toast.batchStarted: PDF export started for all lessons.

exportLesson.title: Export PDF — {{lesson}}
exportLesson.description: Choose the graphic template to apply to the lesson PDF.

exportAll.title: Export PDF for all lessons
exportAll.description: {{count}} lessons will be exported with the selected graphic template.

dialog.noTemplates: No templates configured for the organization. The built-in default template will be used.

pdf.label: PDF out of sync with current content

speech.label: Slides or content changed since last generation

speechPdf.label: PDF out of sync with current speech

courseSettings.title: Course parameters
courseSettings.subtitle: Default values used to generate the structure of a new course in this organization.

structure.title: Course structure
structure.subtitle: How many modules and lessons are generated per credit.

assessment.subtitle: The last lesson of every module is an auto-generated knowledge assessment.
assessment.disabledHint: No final assessment is generated. Each module ends with its last regular lesson.

fields.assessmentHelp: If enabled, the last lesson of every module is an auto-generated knowledge assessment: a set of questions (multiple choice and open) is generated to verify acquired competencies. The platform only generates content; student delivery is out of scope.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete the organization?
deleteConfirm.message: You are about to delete "{{name}}". The action is reversible from the admin side.

removeConfirm.title: Remove the member?
removeConfirm.message: {{name}} will be removed from the organization.

transferConfirm.title: Transfer creator role?
transferConfirm.message: You will become organization admin and {{name}} will become creator. Only the new creator can revert.

memberPermissions.title: Permissions of {{name}}
memberPermissions.subtitle: For each permission, leave the role default or force a specific grant/revoke for this member.

createDialog.title: New user
createDialog.name: Full name
createDialog.password: Password (≥10 chars, one uppercase, one digit)

globalPermissions.title: Global permissions
globalPermissions.subtitle: Edit default permissions for each role. They apply to every organization unless explicitly overridden.

preview.title: Main topic of the lesson
preview.subtitle: A brief description of the context: what we will see, why it matters, and which skills we develop.
preview.author: Prof. Mario Rossi

slide.title: Slide templates
slide.subtitle: Create and edit course slide templates
slide.previewHint: Preview updates in real time as you edit.

pdf.title: PDF templates
pdf.subtitle: Create and edit PDF document templates
pdf.previewHint: Preview updates in real time as you edit.

myAvatar.title: My avatar
myAvatar.subtitle: Upload a frontal photo and an audio. Video clips will be automatically generated from these.
myAvatar.imageHint: PNG / JPEG / WEBP. The image will be cropped to a square (1:1).
myAvatar.cropHint: Drag and resize the selection. The aspect ratio is locked to 1:1.
myAvatar.slidePreviewHint: Example of how the avatar will appear at the bottom-right of a slide template.
myAvatar.audioHint: Read the text above out loud. The recording will be used to train a voice model that sounds like you.
myAvatar.scriptHint: Read this text aloud at a natural pace during the recording. The clearer and more relaxed the reading, the better the voice model.
myAvatar.scriptFallback: No specific text is configured for the selected language: showing {{lang}}.
myAvatar.scriptMissing: No reading text is configured for this language. Contact an administrator.
myAvatar.saveWarn: Changing the image will regenerate all clips.
myAvatar.clipsEmpty: No clips configured. Define at least one prompt in admin Configuration → Avatar.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete the avatar?
deleteConfirm.message: Image, audio, and all generated clips will be deleted.

avatarConfig.title: Configuration — Avatar
avatarConfig.subtitle: Manage the video prompts used to generate MiniMax clips and the transcription scripts users will read for voice recording.
avatarConfig.empty: No prompts configured. Add at least one to enable clip generation.
avatarConfig.unsavedHint: Unsaved changes — blur the field to save.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete the prompt?
deleteConfirm.message: Prompt "{{name}}" will be removed from the configuration.

voiceScript.title: Text to read during the recording
voiceScript.subtitle: For each language, define the text the user will see and must read aloud while recording the audio. This produces a standardized voice sample for voice cloning.
voiceScript.empty: No texts configured. Add at least one for the default language.
voiceScript.placeholder: Hello, I am introducing myself and reading this short text…

deleteConfirm.title: Delete the text?
deleteConfirm.message: The reading text for language {{lang}} will be removed.

permissionDescriptions.member:view: View the list of organization members with name, email, role and join date. Prerequisite for almost every other action on members.
permissionDescriptions.member:invite: Create email invitations for new members choosing the initial role. Each invitation is a single-use link with 7-day expiry.
permissionDescriptions.member:assign_role: Change the role of an existing member, but only up to your own rank: an Org Admin cannot promote to Creator nor edit a higher-ranked member.
permissionDescriptions.member:remove: Remove a member from the organization. The Creator cannot be removed directly: transfer the role first.
permissionDescriptions.template:slide:manage: Create, edit, delete and choose as default the course slide templates (16:9 / 4:3 format, colors, font, logo, background image).
permissionDescriptions.template:pdf:manage: Create, edit, delete and choose as default the PDF document templates (A4/Letter format, header/footer/margins in mm, colors, logo, background).
permissionDescriptions.permission:manage: Edit organization permissions: per-role overrides (e.g. grant a non-default permission to all Managers) and per-member overrides (targeted grant/revoke).
permissionDescriptions.org:transfer_creator: Transfer the Creator role to another member. The previous Creator becomes Org Admin. Reserved to the Creator and irreversible without a new transfer.
permissionDescriptions.org:update: Edit the organization's profile data: name, VAT number, tax code, address, contacts, logo.
permissionDescriptions.course_config:manage: Configure default parameters for course generation: number of modules per credit, lessons per module, lesson duration and the final knowledge assessment toggle (with the number of multiple choice and open questions to generate). These values pre-populate the structure of a new course.
permissionDescriptions.course:view: See the list of organization courses. Without course:edit, the user only sees courses assigned to them.
permissionDescriptions.course:create: Create a new course choosing title, objectives, language, credits, didactic taxonomies and assignee.
permissionDescriptions.course:assign: Change the assignee of an existing course, transferring responsibility to another organization member.
permissionDescriptions.course:edit: Edit all course parameters (title, objectives, taxonomies, key topics, documents). Implies visibility of every course in the organization, not just assigned ones.
permissionDescriptions.course:delete: Delete a course and all its uploaded documents. This is irreversible.
permissionDescriptions.course:generate: Trigger AI generation of course content (architecture, lessons, slides, audio). Available in future iterations.

i18n.title: Language management
i18n.subtitle: Create, edit and delete platform languages and translations

fields.codeHint: ISO 639-1 (e.g. it, en) or regional (e.g. pt-BR)

deleteConfirm.title: Delete the language?
deleteConfirm.message: You are about to delete "{{name}}" and all its translations.

i18n.autoTranslateConfirm: Do you want to auto-translate {{count}} missing entries for "{{name}}" with AI? This operation uses OpenAI and may take a few seconds.
i18n.autoTranslateNotConfigured: OpenAI is not configured: set OPENAI_API_KEY in your .env file.

clearAllConfirm.title: Clear all translations?
clearAllConfirm.message: You are about to delete all {{count}} translations for "{{name}}". You can then regenerate them with the "Complete with AI" button. This cannot be undone.

noOrg.title: Welcome
noOrg.message: You are not yet a member of any organization. Wait for an invitation or contact an administrator.

taxonomies.title: Course taxonomies
taxonomies.subtitle: Multilingual lookup values used in the course-creation menus. Editable by platform admins only.

content_depth.title: Content depth
content_depth.subtitle: Depth at which the content is covered.

teacher_role.title: Teacher roles
teacher_role.subtitle: Profile that the virtual teacher takes during the course.

target_audience.title: Target audience
target_audience.subtitle: Type of audience the course is built for.

eqf_level.title: EQF levels
eqf_level.subtitle: European Qualifications Framework: levels and associated qualifications.

term.autoTranslateHint: Save the term, then use "Translate with AI" to fill in the other languages.
term.autoTranslateAllSuccess: Translated {{labels}} labels and {{descriptions}} descriptions across {{languages}} languages.

autoTranslateAllConfirm.title: Translate all terms?
autoTranslateAllConfirm.message: OpenAI will translate every term in this taxonomy ({{count}} terms) into every active language, starting from IT. It may take a few minutes.

fields.slugHint: Stable identifier (snake_case). Cannot be changed after creation.
fields.label: Label

deleteConfirm.title: Delete term?
deleteConfirm.message: You are about to delete "{{name}}". This cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.messageWithChildren_one: You are about to delete "{{name}}" and {{count}} linked sub-category. This cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.messageWithChildren_other: You are about to delete "{{name}}" and {{count}} linked sub-categories. This cannot be undone.
